'''Tarania Lona''' was an actress of note during the period surrounding the [[Battle of Tralus (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Tralus]]. She appeared in the [[holosquirmer]] genre. By some accounts, she possessed superlative qualities.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1stm}}
